name: openclaw--skills--ai-proposal-generator
description: Generate professional HTML proposals from meeting notes. Features 5 proposal styles (Corporate, Entrepreneur, Creative, Consultant, Minimal), 6+ color themes, and a Design Wizard for custom templates. Triggers on "create proposal", "proposal for [client]", "proposal wizard", "proposal from [notes]", "show proposal styles", "finalize proposal". Integrates with ai-meeting-notes for context. Outputs beautiful, responsive HTML ready to send or export as PDF. Use when this capability is needed.
